name: First Spark
title: Answered on the first ring.
body: A voice on the line every hour of the night — greeting, qualifying, booking while the ember is still bright.
entry_state: a single drifting ember floating ahead of the camera in near-dark
exit_state: one station fully alight behind the camera, warm amber light spilling forward into the next dark passage
still_169:
Cinematic photorealistic night world of an ancient Celtic iron forge carved into black bedrock. Near-total darkness — the only light: a horn-and-bellows signal-station of dark iron and stone half-lit at the moment of ignition, amber light blooming chamber by chamber from within, a single drifting ember beside it. Deep near-black shadows (#0A0908); where lit, molten amber highlights (#E9A94F), ember orange (#E2622B), rust (#B5623A), warm cream glow (#E7CFAE); where dead, cold ash grey-blue on black iron. Volumetric smoke haze, wet black stone with faint reflections, subtle carved Celtic knotwork worked into the rock surfaces. Dark industrial realism, low-key chiaroscuro lighting, anamorphic cinematic feel, atmospheric depth. No people, no figures, no hands, no text, no letters, no numbers, no signage, no logos.
Subject: the moment of ignition inside a dark signal-station chamber — a horn-and-bellows apparatus of dark iron and stone, half-lit, waking: amber light blooming chamber by chamber from deep inside its iron body, the bloom spreading upward through the horn, its glow catching wet black stone and carved knotwork while the far half of the apparatus still sits cold ash grey-blue in darkness. Composition: apparatus just off-center, the spreading amber bloom the sole light source, deep black negative space around it.

Vertical 9:16 composition, tall frame, key subject centered, generous dark headroom above for overlay copy.
leg_prompt: The camera continues the same slow, steady forward drift it was already in, without any pause, jump, or reversal. Cinematic photorealistic night world of an ancient Celtic iron forge carved into black bedrock. Near-total darkness — the only light: a single drifting ember floating ahead of the camera in near-dark. Deep near-black shadows (#0A0908); where lit, molten amber highlights (#E9A94F), ember orange (#E2622B), rust (#B5623A), warm cream glow (#E7CFAE); where dead, cold ash grey-blue on black iron. Volumetric smoke haze, wet black stone with faint reflections, subtle carved Celtic knotwork worked into the rock surfaces. Dark industrial realism, low-key chiaroscuro lighting, anamorphic cinematic feel, atmospheric depth. No people, no figures, no hands, no text, no letters, no numbers, no signage, no logos. The camera follows the single drifting ember forward through the darkness as it floats into a dark signal-station chamber, where the ember settles onto a horn-and-bellows apparatus of dark iron and stone. The camera keeps pushing slowly toward the apparatus as it ignites from within: amber light blooming chamber by chamber through its iron body and up into the horn, the apparatus visibly waking, glow spreading across wet black stone and carved knotwork. The camera holds its slow forward drift close beside the apparatus while the light blooms to full warmth, then continues past it into the dark passage its glow now reveals, warm amber light from the fully lit station spilling forward over the camera into the passage ahead. Single continuous camera move with no cuts. Smooth, graceful, slow cinematic motion. No people, no text. In the final second the camera settles into a slow, steady forward drift, perfectly smooth.
